decision: full ship plugin despite dogfood commitment
rationale: User override on pitch-day 5:35 AM. Accepted calibration warnings. HITL choice.

title: MCP Browser Consolidation
decision: Keep 2 of 3 browser tools (recommendation: claude-in-chrome + playwright)
rationale: Overlap between 3 tools creates maintenance burden; 2 covers all use cases
